channel.title: RHEL9 on Pablo Iranzo Gómez blog
channel.description: Recent content in RHEL9 on Pablo Iranzo Gómez blog

item.title: Enable Libvirt rw socket on RHEL9
item.description: RHEL9 by default uses read-only socket which is not usable by some tools like Kcli… to enable it use: systemctl enable --now libvirtd.socket libvirtd-ro.socket systemctl stop libvirtd.service systemctl enable --now virtproxyd.socket virtproxyd-ro.socket systemctl stop virtproxyd.service
